title: BEM-933 Block B foundation
objective:
Run script:
"""
def write_file(path, text):
    p=Path(path)
    p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(p))

for d in ['gd_strategy','gd_system_rules','dir_analysis','dir_worker_rules','wrk_c1','wrk_c2','wrk_c3']:
    p=Path('governance/workspaces')/d
    p.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    changed_files.append(str(p/'.gitkeep'))
    (p/'.gitkeep').write_text('', encoding='utf-8')

write_file('governance/state/workspace_policy.json', '''{
  "version":"1.0",

  "rule":"Workspace belongs to internal contour, not individual element.",
  "write_policy":"Contour workspace may be modified during work; main workspace changes require auditor-approved result and proof."
}
''')

write_file('governance/validators/validate_block_b_foundation.py', '''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
required = [
  'governance/state/object_passports.json',
  'governance/state/contours_registry.json',
  'governance/state/providers_registry.json',
  'governance/state/contour_provider_policy.json',
  'governance/state/provider_failover_policy.json',
  'governance/state/workspace_policy.json'
]
missing = [p for p in required if not Path(p).exists()]
if missing:
    raise SystemExit('MISSING: ' + ', '.join(missing))
for p in required:
    json.loads(Path(p).read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
print('BEM-933 Block B foundation validator PASS')
''')
